string.text: {=YR8DvcVZ}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=GLmGX4ZG}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has loyally served the High Dukes of Poland and the many kings before that for generations.

{=LAMeCFwB}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME} Our family has stood in the Royal Court of Poland and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Kingdom of Poland.

{=QgYFGYYx}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the English.
{=DRzsgjsD}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. I am sure you have heard the name of our family in the epics of Europe.
{=BSqMasBU}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. There's not a family in Lithuania who hasn't contributed the head of one of their champions to our collection!
